summary: Sourcey 3.6.5 reproducibly generated a live TySug llms.txt and seven linked Go reference targets from the real repository source. The output is published at a durable GitHub Pages URL, an upstream pull request is open against Dynom/TySug, and a signed runx validation receipt verifies the public check exited successfully.

generation.command: cd docs/sourcey && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm build
generation.output: Sourcey built 7 pages; fix-base-path.mjs rewrote 118 navigation links; git diff --exit-code returned clean; regenerated llms.txt SHA-256 remained a1269aae0810f72b3c210ad8bf8470fa89837ab5f8381233fbf761f1bc4551aa.

observations.output: Dynom/TySug is the existing upstream repository; the generated map covers six Go packages and the runnable web command from the pinned source tree.
Upstream source commit 708d0917d75b114dded2e9fc9b485f988c6edf88; reproducible PR head 104e64505a4666fccbbb1d6e658b2b7b2f5efe9d.
Sourcey 3.6.5 was run through the pinned package and lockfile; a clean rebuild reproduced the tracked output with no git diff and the same llms.txt digest.
HTTP 200 text/plain at https://q10283245.github.io/docs/reference/llms.txt with 608 bytes and SHA-256 a1269aae0810f72b3c210ad8bf8470fa89837ab5f8381233fbf761f1bc4551aa.
https://q10283245.github.io/docs/reference/pkg-cmd-web.html returned HTTP 200 and title cmd/web - TySug.
https://q10283245.github.io/docs/reference/pkg-finder.html returned HTTP 200 and title finder - TySug.
https://q10283245.github.io/docs/reference/pkg-internal-rwc.html returned HTTP 200 and title internal/rwc - TySug.
https://q10283245.github.io/docs/reference/pkg-keyboard.html returned HTTP 200 and title keyboard - TySug.
https://q10283245.github.io/docs/reference/pkg-server.html returned HTTP 200 and title server - TySug.
https://q10283245.github.io/docs/reference/pkg-server-service.html returned HTTP 200 and title server/service - TySug.
https://q10283245.github.io/docs/reference/ returned HTTP 200 and the generated TySug reference index.
https://github.com/Dynom/TySug/pull/25 is open, mergeable, and adds the generated llms.txt plus the project-owned docs/reference link.
The authenticated q10283245 GitHub session displayed sourcey/sourcey as Starred; Frantic performs the authoritative machine check.
The runx harness fetched the live llms.txt, matched its digest, fetched all seven linked targets and the upstream PR, and sealed a signed process_closed receipt.
